titleStmt.title: SII 5.434: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 434. (A.R. No. 143 of 1894). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . komāṟapaṉmarāṉa tribhu vaṉaccakra vattikaḷ śrīsundara pāṇṭiyatevarkku yāṇṭu patiṉo
ṉṟāvatu vaikācimāsattu mutaṟtiyati nāyiṟṟukkiḻamai peṟṟa Attattu nāḷ kiḻvempa nāṭṭu tiru
nelvelic cuttamalipperunteruvil vāṇiyarom Arumporkkūṟṟattup pulikuṭi veḷiyāṟṟūru
ṭaiyāṉ paṭṭālakaṉuṭaiya nāyakaṉukkum māṭakkuḷak(ku)kiḻ maturaic civallavaṉ maṭikaiypūta
maṅkalam Uṭaiyāṉ mācāttuvaṇikaṉ cokkaṉukkum piṭipāṭu kuṭutta paricāvatu Uṭaiyār tirune
lveliyuṭaiyār koyil vaṭapārucattil Eḻuntaruḷiyirukkum jaṭādhāriśva ramuṭaiyaṉāyaṉārkku nittanima
ntamākac candrāditya vaṟ cantiyādī pamāka Uṭaiyār koyiṟ perumpaṭiyoṭe kūṭa Aṉavaratāṉaṉālv nāṅka
ḷ Aḷakkum Eṇṇai Āḻākku Ivveṇṇai Āḻākku Aḷappomākac ciṟukālaiccantikku Uṭaiyanāya
kaṉ vaitta viḷakku Oṉṟum cokkaṉār Anticcantikku vaitta viḷakku muṉṟum Āka viḷakku nālukkum I
varkaḷ pakkal Emmillicainta vilaipporuḷ kaiyyiṟkoṇṭu Aḷappomāka kallilum cem
pilum veṭṭikkoḷka Ippaṭi sammatittup piṭipāṭu kuṭuttom vāṇiyarom Uṭaiyanāyakaṉukkum
cokkaṉukkum . Ippaṭik kivai taṉmapotiyarāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai nakaraceṉāpati Eḻuttu Ivai nantavattarāyaṉ Eḻuttu
Ivai potiyarāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai māṇikkavācakaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai Uttamapo tiyarāyaṉ Eḻuttu Iv
ai vaikaiyarāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai Uttamapālaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai camaiyamantiri Eḻuttu Ivai Aḷakaiyarāya
ṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 5.434 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
